title: ipomoea coccinea f. luteola
intro: Ipomoea coccinea f. luteola, also known as Yellow Ipomoea or Yellow Morning Glory, is a flowering plant species within the Ipomoea coccinea species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea coccinea f. luteola include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and flowers are used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
